_comment: Copy this file to secrets/dev-credentials.local.json and fill it in. secrets/ is gitignored. This is the SINGLE source of truth for every test tier's credentials (unit needs nothing; integration + live copy + E2E onboarding + AI features + live economic-calendar sources all read this one file). Environment variables still override any value. The OAuth onboarding writes the refreshed tokens back into OpenApi.Tokens here. There are no legacy split-file fallbacks.
